caption: The video captures a grayscale thermal imaging perspective of an explosion in a desolate, open area. In the initial scene, several bright, vertical plumes of fire and smoke erupt from the ground, creating a jagged white silhouette against the darker landscape. As the sequence progresses, these plumes merge into a single, larger column of intense heat and debris that rises higher into the air. The environment appears barren, with a hazy, textured terrain. Various overlays are present on the screen, including a logo in the top left corner with the text "ГОЛОВНЕ УПРАВЛІННЯ РОЗВІДКИ," a red "13" logo in the top right, and a circular "GROUP 13" emblem in the bottom right. Crosshair markers are centered in the view, indicating the camera is likely attached to a targeting system or drone. No people are visible in the footage.
